title: The Navy Closes In
description: On pages 11, 12, 13, 14, this part focuses on the silent x-mark farewell. Vivi and the Straw Hats part ways without words, using their shared mark to prove their friendship while protecting her from the Navy.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Silent X-Mark Farewell sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Luffy, Vivi, Nami, Usopp, Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: It's the Chikuwa-dude! You're still alive!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You're all mistaken. This is Terracotta.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Not even a shred of dignity...!

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: Don't worry, there's still plenty left!

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta citizen
dialogue.text: Whoa, since when were you here!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Can I get some more booze!?

summary: Vivi and the Straw Hats part ways without words, using their shared mark to prove their friendship while protecting her from the Navy.
